hero.subtitle: 24/7 EMERGENCY CARE
hero.title: Emergency Dental Services
hero.description: Immediate dental care when you need it most. Our emergency dental team is available 24/7 to provide quick relief from pain and urgent dental problems.

overview.title: Immediate Care Solutions
overview.description: We handle all types of dental emergencies with prompt, professional care to relieve your pain and address urgent dental problems.

emergencies.title: Emergency Services We Provide
emergencies.description: Immediate treatment for urgent dental problems

firstAid.title: Emergency Dental First Aid
firstAid.description: What to do before reaching our office

instructions: Find the tooth and hold it by the crown
Try to reinsert in socket if possible
Keep tooth moist in milk or saliva
Use dental floss to remove trapped food
Do not apply aspirin directly to the area
Cover sharp edges with dental wax

questions.question: What qualifies as a dental emergency?
questions.answer: Severe pain, bleeding, knocked-out teeth, loose adult teeth, or significant trauma to the mouth and face are considered dental emergencies requiring immediate attention.

questions.question: How quickly can I be seen?
questions.answer: We prioritize emergency cases and will see you as soon as possible, typically within the same day. Severe emergencies receive immediate attention.

questions.question: What if I have an emergency outside of regular hours?
questions.answer: Our 24/7 emergency line ensures you can reach us anytime. We provide guidance and arrange immediate care when needed.

questions.question: How much does emergency treatment cost?
questions.answer: Costs vary depending on the treatment required. We accept most insurance plans and offer payment options to ensure you receive necessary care.

reviews.name: John D.
reviews.comment: Incredible response time! They saw me within an hour of calling with my broken tooth. Professional and caring team.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.comment: The emergency team was amazing when my son knocked out his tooth. Their quick action saved it!

cta.title: Dental Emergency?
cta.description: Don't wait - contact us immediately for urgent dental care.
